items.summary: Chapter 12 review of phrases for directions, postcards, weather, sequence and travel grammar.
Review speaking game: role-play a holiday day — pack a suitcase, buy a souvenir.
Holiday role-play continued: plan the day together and discuss it at dinner.
Word games: recount yesterday with sequence words, match questions to answers, timed vocabulary duel.
Read colleagues' emails to identify Andrea's delegated tasks and what remains for Monday.
D-A-CH country quiz part 1: German capital, population, landmarks, neighbours, regional foods, Swiss capital.
D-A-CH quiz part 2: Swiss languages/population, Austrian capital, flag, population; odd-one-out Vienna photo.
Grammar reference: statement sentences, word order, W-questions and yes/no questions.
Grammar reference: imperatives, connectors und/oder/aber/denn, present-tense conjugation and irregular verbs.
Grammar reference: sein/haben/werden, wissen, modal verbs, imperative, Präteritum and Perfekt.
Grammar reference: past participle formation and the sentence bracket (Satzklammer).
Grammar reference: nouns, definite/indefinite/negation articles, plurals and case forms.
Grammar reference: article cases, possessive, interrogative and demonstrative articles.
Grammar reference: adjectives, personal pronouns, man, and prepositions für/mit.
Grammar reference: time and date expressions, place prepositions and Wechselpräpositionen.
In-preposition tables, question words, and the start of the irregular-verb list.
Irregular verb list continued, plus special verbs and modal verbs reference.
Alphabetical word list: how to read entries, plus first A-entries.
